_comment: Two seed speakers used by gem #2 (JACC) to demonstrate per-user filtering and by gem #5 (LLM) to ground recommendations in real portfolios.

portfolio.title: Hidden Gems of Jakarta EE
portfolio.abstractText: Five overlooked Jakarta specs that already do what you reach for MicroProfile, Spring, Reactor, Langchain4j and Keycloak for. Live-coded from observability to a streaming local LLM, no non-Jakarta runtime deps.

portfolio.title: Disposable Docker Containers in Day-to-Day Development
portfolio.abstractText: How throwaway containers replace local installs for databases, message brokers, identity providers and LLMs — and why your shell history is happier for it.

portfolio.title: Generating QR Codes with Secure Hashes Using Java
portfolio.abstractText: A small problem (verifiable QR codes) used as a vehicle to revisit cryptographic hashing, content addressing, and how 50 lines of plain Java still beat reaching for a library.

portfolio.title: Five Pillars of a Good Maven Project
portfolio.abstractText: Reproducibility, transparency, layered config, fast feedback, single-command bootstrap — what makes a Maven project a good citizen on a colleague's laptop in 2026.

portfolio.title: Slack Notifications for Cloud Build
portfolio.abstractText: A practical pipeline pattern: turning CI events into actionable Slack messages without writing a webhook server, using Cloud Build, Pub/Sub and a tiny Cloud Function.

portfolio.title: What Happens to Your Code After a Commit
portfolio.abstractText: A guided tour of the journey from `git push` to production: hooks, CI, image registries, deployment, observability — with the failure modes you only learn the hard way.

portfolio.title: Reasoning and Semantic Wizardry
portfolio.abstractText: From RDF and SPARQL to embeddings and vector search: how 'semantic' has been quietly redefined twice in twenty years, and what each generation got right.

portfolio.title: On-device LLMs for Mobile Apps
portfolio.abstractText: Running quantised language models directly on Android and iOS — what works in 2026, what still needs a backend, and the UX patterns that hide latency.

portfolio.title: Flutter Performance Pitfalls
portfolio.abstractText: The five rebuild-storm patterns I keep finding in Flutter codebases, how to spot them with the framework's own tools, and the three-line refactors that fix them.

portfolio.title: Cross-platform Without Compromise
portfolio.abstractText: A pragmatic case study migrating a 4-year-old native Android + iOS app to a shared cross-platform core — what we kept native, what we shared, and why.
